semantic.role: Service-layer data-access function providing ArchSpine dashboard metadata from the .spine control plane.
responsibilities: Read and aggregate dashboard status from the .spine directory (existence, last sync timestamp, enabled view IDs, total rule count).
Encapsulate file I/O so CLI modules remain thin entrypoints without direct filesystem logic.
Expose a typed interface (DashboardData) describing the control plane's current state.
outOfScope: Modifying or writing to the .spine directory.
invariants: The module resides under src/services/, not src/infra/, satisfying the service-runtime-boundary rule's intent.
All filesystem operations target only the .spine directory relative to the provided rootDir.
No side-effects beyond reading the filesystem.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Keep CLI modules thin by moving raw filesystem access into a dedicated service module.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Unknown; git intent shows only a minor bump, no functional change.

publicSurface.description: Reads and returns dashboard status from the .spine control plane. Used by CLI commands to display current ArchSpine state.
Data transfer object describing the .spine control plane status: hasSpine, lastSync timestamp, list of enabledViews, and rulesCount.

ruleViolations.reason: The file src/services/dashboard-service.ts is a view-specific service module (it provides dashboard metadata). The rule states that view-specific service modules should live under src/services/view/** rather than directly in src/services/. The current location violates that placement directive.
